A corrupted main.gen.go never blocks its own regeneration.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- main.gen.go --
<<<<<<< HEAD
garbage from a merge conflict
=======
more garbage
>>>>>>> other
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /
func Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.

package main

import (
	"app/web"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	r := router.New()

	// Routes
	r.Method("GET", "/", web.Index)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
